title: Tonight
lyrics:
[¥ellow Bucks「Tonight ft. Tina」歌詞]

[Chorus]
The best the best
I'm the best yeah
Chest to chest
Kiss on my neck yeah
Can't stop
Won't stop I'm so fly
She wanna fuck with me
I'm ready tonight
The best the best
I'm the best yeah
揺れるChainとS on my chest yeah

She wanna fuck with me
I'm wit it tonight
